org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql.Column

Package
Description
org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping
 
org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql
Statement Builder implementation.
org.springframework.data.relational.core.sql.render
SQL rendering utilities to render SQL from the Statement Builder API.

  • Uses of Column in org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping

    Methods in org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping that return types with arguments of type Column
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Column>
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfos.toColumnList(BiFunction<AggregatePath, AggregatePath.ColumnInfo, Column> mappingFunction)
    Creates a List of Column instances by applying the provided mapping function to each AggregatePath and AggregatePath.ColumnInfo.
    List<Column>
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfos.toColumnList(Table table)
    Converts the given Table into a list of Columns.
    Map<AggregatePath, Column>
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfos.toMap(Table table)
    Create a Map of AggregatePath to Column using the given Table as column source.
    Method parameters in org.springframework.data.relational.core.mapping with type arguments of type Column
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Column>
    AggregatePath.ColumnInfos.toColumnList(BiFunction<AggregatePath, AggregatePath.ColumnInfo, Column> mappingFunction)
    Creates a List of Column instances by applying the provided mapping function to each AggregatePath and AggregatePath.ColumnInfo.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description

    Add a Column to the INTO column list.
    InsertBuilder.InsertIntoColumnsAndValuesWithBuild
    InsertBuilder.InsertIntoColumnsAndValues.columns(Column... columns)
    Add a one or more Column to the INTO column list.
    static AssignValue
    AssignValue.create(Column target, Expression value)
    Creates a value assignment to a Column given an Expression.
    static In
    Conditions.notIn(Column column, Select subselect)
    Creates a NOT IN clause for a subselect.
    default UpsertBuilder.ConflictResolution
    UpsertBuilder.OngoingConflictResolution.update(Column... columns)
    Resolve the conflict by updating the given columns of the existing row.
    static AssignValue
    Assignments.value(Column target, Expression value)
    Creates a value assignment to a Column given an Expression.
    default UpsertBuilder.OngoingConflictResolution
    UpsertBuilder.ConflictColumn.with(Column column)
    Start building the conflict resolution by specifying a conflict/matching column.
    default UpsertBuilder.OngoingConflictResolution
    UpsertBuilder.ConflictColumn.with(Column... columns)
    Start building the conflict resolution by specifying conflict/matching columns.
